title: Okta tokens should not be disclosed
description: In most cases, trust boundaries are violated when a secret is exposed in a source code repository or an uncontrolled deployment environment. Unintended people who don’t need to know the secret might get access to it. They might then be able to use it to gain unwanted access to associated services or resources.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Okta API token detected with SSSW prefix. Okta API tokens provide programmatic access to Okta's Admin API, allowing complete control over users, groups, applications, policies, and authentication settings. Exposing these tokens enables attackers to create/delete users, modify authentication policies, access sensitive user data, and compromise your entire identity infrastructure. Revoke this token immediately and store API tokens securely in environment variables or secret management systems.

Okta API token detected in variable assignment. Okta API tokens grant full administrative access to your Okta organization's APIs. Exposing these tokens allows unauthorized users to manage user accounts, modify security policies, access authentication logs, configure applications, and compromise your identity management system. Store API tokens securely using environment variables or secret management systems.

Okta API token detected in SSWS authorization header. SSWS (Single Sign-Web Service) tokens are used for Okta Admin API authentication. Exposing these tokens in authorization headers provides attackers with full administrative access to your Okta organization, allowing user management, policy modifications, application configuration changes, and complete identity infrastructure compromise. Use secure credential storage and rotate tokens immediately if exposed.

Okta bearer token detected in authorization header. Bearer tokens provide direct API access to Okta services for user authentication, session management, and resource access. Exposing these tokens allows unauthorized API calls, user impersonation, session hijacking, and unauthorized access to protected resources. Store tokens securely and implement proper token rotation and expiration.

Generic Okta API token detected in source code. Okta API tokens authenticate administrative operations including user provisioning, group management, application configuration, and policy enforcement. Exposing these credentials enables attackers to perform unauthorized administrative actions, access sensitive identity data, manipulate authentication flows, and compromise your entire identity management infrastructure. Use environment variables or secret management systems for secure credential storage.
